sources.title: 1997 - Hacks - Hollywood writers gone rogue - Directed by Gary Rosen
sources.description:
Hollywood’s sharpest pens face the biggest rewrite of their lives when one balcony encounter sends their careers — and friendships — into a wild spin.
TV writer‑producer Brian (Stephen Rea) is stuck trying to dream up a full 22‑episode anthology series when he witnesses a mysterious late‑night balcony rendezvous outside his Hollywood apartment. Instead of calling it a night, he recruits his equally ambitious (and desperate) writer friends to spin the moment into competing storylines, turning one strange encounter into a chaotic creative showdown across Los Angeles.

Original Title: Hacks (1997) | AKA: Sink or Swim, The Big Twist

⭐️ STARRING
Stephen Rea - Brian
Illeana Douglas - Georgia Feckler
John Ritter - Hank
Dave Foley - Neal
Richard Kind - Benny
Dusty Kay - Ira Gold
Tom Arnold - Danny
Robert Patrick - Goatee
Ryan O’Neal - Dr. Applefield
Ricky Jay - The Hat
Jason Priestley - The Dude
Olivia d’Abo - Lynn
Lisa Kudrow - Reading Woman
Bob Odenkirk - Cellmate

🎬 CREW
Director & Writer: Gary Rosen
Cinematography by Ralf D. Bode
Original Score by Anthony Marinelli


🎯 WHY WATCH?
🎭 Inside‑Hollywood satire • 📝 Writers‑room chaos • 🎥 Balcony‑side mystery

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics
Comedy • Satire • Hollywood Stories • ’90s Indies • Mystery

metadata.Plot: Brian is a television writer-producer who has to script a 22-episode anthology, but lacks inspiration. He witnesses a strange romantic encounter between two figures on the balcony of hotel near his flat and decides to write scripts with his writer friends based on what he saw.
metadata.Actors: Stephen Rea, Illeana Douglas, John Ritter
